title: DFU - Disconnecting/connecting earbuds to check DFU Pop Up
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) shows "Update currently not available" pop-up when one earbud is disconnected, and pop-up persists after earbud reconnection until dismissed
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on Firmware Update (DFU) option
Remove the right earbud from your ear and place it in the charging case (disconnecting it)
Attempt to start the firmware update from the app
Observe the pop-up message displayed on screen
Remove the right earbud from the charging case and ensure it reconnects
Attempt to start the firmware update again
Observe whether the pop-up reappears and remains until dismissed
Repeat steps 5–11 with the left earbud disconnected instead
expected: When one earbud is disconnected (placed in charging case), the app displays a pop-up: "Update currently not available, please try back later". After reconnecting the earbud, the pop-up remains on screen until manually dismissed by the user. This behavior is consistent for both right and left earbud disconnection scenarios.
